Description: Triggers fulfillment data generator Lambda every Monday at 3am UTC

Notes.Purpose: Weekly incremental data generation for production pipeline
Notes.WhenToEnable: After testing phase is complete — generates 7 days per run
Notes.WhenToDisable: Daily rule should be disabled when this is enabled
Notes.UTCTime: 3:00 AM UTC Monday = 11:00 PM EST Sunday / 10:00 PM CST Sunday
Notes.ExpectedDuration: ~15-20 minutes per run (7 days of data)
Notes.DataGenerated: ~189,000 rows across 7 fact tables for 7 days
